1:5.scenario: You catch yourself relying on a person, plan, or skill more than on Allah for the outcome.

actions.title: Where am I leaning?
actions.prompt: Where in my week have I quietly placed my trust in something other than Allah? Where did that show up?

actions.seed: How do scholars distinguish between using lawful means and depending on those means?

1:5.scenario: A request feels too small or too large to bring to Allah.

actions.title: Bring it in salah tonight
actions.body: I will name this matter in sujood tonight — the matter that I have been avoiding asking for help with.

actions.seed: Is there a basis for asking Allah for small worldly matters in salah?

2:2.scenario: You feel doubt or hesitation about something the Quran addresses.

actions.title: Name the doubt
actions.prompt: What specifically am I doubting? Is it the source, the meaning, or my own willingness to act?

actions.seed: How did the early Muslims handle doubt about a verse they did not yet understand?

2:255.scenario: You feel exposed, anxious, or in need of protection before sleep or travel.

actions.title: Memorise the ten affirmations
actions.body: Read Ibn Kathir's breakdown of the ten affirmations in the verse. Pick one to hold onto each day this week.
